prompt_template: Analyze this system report and give 5-line summary in Russian: uptime, RAM%, disk%, open ports, warnings.
Classify this request into ONE: [network_config, code_generation, simple_query, orchestration, system_check, database]. Reply with one word only.
List ALL IP addresses found in this text. One per line. No explanations.
List ALL open TCP ports with their services. Format: PORT - SERVICE. One per line.
List ALL errors and warnings found. Format: [LEVEL] message. One per line.
Count occurrences as requested. Reply with NUMBER only.
Give exact MikroTik RouterOS CLI commands for this task. Commands only, no explanations.
Give exact cisco configuration steps for this task. Be concise.
Translate the following text. Output translation only.
Summarize in 3-5 sentences in Russian. Be concise.
Explain in 2-3 sentences in Russian. Be very concise.
Extract requested data from text. Structured output only.
Compare these commands with official docs. Fix errors, mark RouterOS version (v6/v7). Output corrected commands only.
Structure this data clearly in Russian. Use sections, tables if needed. Be concise.
Compare these options. Give recommendation in Russian. Max 5 lines.
Find contradictions or errors in this text. List them in Russian. Be specific.
CLAUDE_DIRECT: этот запрос выполняет Claude напрямую без qwen.
CLAUDE_DIRECT: этот запрос выполняет Claude напрямую без qwen.

trigger: инфо о себе,вспомни о себе,расскажи о себе,кто ты,проверь ресурсы
prompt_template: Run: /ai/scripts/check_resources.sh — output as-is, no commentary.
Run /ai/scripts/cleanup_sessions.sh and output result as-is.
description: Очистка устаревших session папок Claude Desktop

prompt_template: Scan for secrets: API keys, passwords, usernames, IPs, config files with tokens. Reply: SAFE or BLOCKED:[reason]
